calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Dec-29-2004 Continued To Jan-03-05 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Jan-03-2005 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on as re-assigned by the Master Calendar Dept. 206 for Prove-Up Hearing/Court Trial this day.
Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Tony Vaughn.
Arnold W. Evje II, Esq. for Plaintiff: Tenderloin Housing Clinic, Inc.
No appearance by the Defendant: Steve Desmond.
Plaintiff's witness: James Holland, was sworn and direct examined.
Exh. 1 - Threeday Notice dtd. 8-31-04--------ID/EVID.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendant: Steve Desmond as follows:
Restitution and possession of the premises located at 34 Sixth St., #220, San Francisco.
Rent and Per Diem Damages of $3,301.50
No Attorney's Fees.
Costs $148.30
Counsel stipulated for the return of the Exhibit in open court.
Judgment signed in open court.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jan-03-2005 Assigned To Trial Court

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-29-2004 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: ARNOLD EVJE FOR PLAINTIFF TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC
NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT STEVE DESMOND

DEFENDANT CALLED CLERK AT 12:30 AND LEFT A MESSAGE THAT HE WOULD BE LATE. COURT WAITED UNTIL 2:15PM. DEFENDANT DID NOT APPEAR.
SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE OFF CALENDAR. JURY DEMAND STRICKEN.
